_note: 7 curated + auto-derived (DeriveGatedAreas, requires reviewed by subagent pass). 10 large-dungeon boxes held for hand-trim.

areas.name: Champions' Guild
areas.derivation: Door 'championdoor' (id 1805) at 0_49_52_55_35 (abs 3191,3363). Building perimeter = 'brickwall' (id 1902) placements spanning local x51-58,z22-35 on BOTH level 0 and level 1 (m49_52.jm2), +2 tile pad.
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Champions' Guild: requires 32 Quest Points)

areas.name: Heroes' Guild
areas.derivation: Doors 'herodoor_l'/'herodoor_r' at 0_45_54_22_54 / 22_55 (abs 2902,3510-3511). Walled compound = 'castlewall' (id 1911) placements spanning local x8-22,z47-62 on levels 0/1/2 (m45_54.jm2), +2 tile pad.
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Heroes' Guild: requires completion of the Heroes' Quest)

areas.name: Legends' Guild
areas.derivation: Gate 'legendsguildgatel'/'legendsguildgater' at 0_42_52_40_21 / 41_21 (abs 2728-2729,3349), constants ^legends_guild_gate_west_coord etc. Level 0 = outer fence+building ('timberwall'/'bluepaintedbrickwall_2'/'wallshield3_white') local x29-52,z20-47; level 1 = building only local x34-46,z35-47; level 2 = small upper room ('brickwall') local x35-46,z44-48 (m42_52.jm2), +2 tile pad each.
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Legends' Guild: requires completion of the Legends' Quest)

areas.name: Crafting Guild
areas.derivation: Door 'crafting_guild_door' at 0_45_51_53_25 (abs 2933,3289); vanilla check is level 40 Crafting AND worn brown apron (allOf). Level 0 = 'paintedbrickwall_1' local x47-59,z13-29; level 1 = 'paintedbrickwall_2' local x50-56,z17-24 (m45_51.jm2), +2 tile pad each.
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Crafting Guild: requires level 40 Crafting and a worn brown apron)

areas.name: Wizards' Guild
areas.derivation: Doors 'magicguild_door_l'/'magicguild_door_r' (two pairs, outer+inner) around local x24-37,z15-16 (m40_48.jm2, abs 2584-2597,3087-3088). Level 0 = tower shell 'bluepaintedbrickwall_1' local x24-37,z9-22; levels 1/2 = 'witcheswallchart' local x25-35,z12-19, +2 tile pad each.
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Wizards' Guild: requires level 66 Magic)

areas.name: Mining Guild
areas.derivation: Surface ladder 'miningguildladder' at 0_47_52_10-12_10-12 (Falador mining site, movecoord +6400 z to the underground layer); interior door 'miningguilddoor' at 0_47_152_38_28 (abs 3046,9756). The whole dungeon is self-contained within mapsquare (47,152) - 'cavewall_top'/'cavewall_face1' fill essentially the entire square on levels 0-1, so the box is the full mapsquare (no pad needed/possible - padding would spill into an unrelated adjacent square). NOTE: mining_guild.rs2 is a standalone script, not in the ladders+stairs shuffle pool today - included for forward coverage if workstream B ever adds it.
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Mining Guild: requires level 60 Mining)

areas.name: Prayer Guild
areas.derivation: Ladder 'monasteryladder' at 0_47_54_38_27 / 49_27 (abs 3046/3057,3483), gated by varp %prayer_guild (set permanently to 1 via Abbot Langley dialogue, itself requiring stat_base(prayer)>=31 at join time - the persistent flag is what the ladder rechecks, so that's what this area gate mirrors). ONLY the upper floor is members-only (ground floor chapel is public) - box covers level 1 only: monastery building 'paintedbrickwall_2' local x35-52,z25-44 (m47_54.jm2), +2 tile pad.
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Prayer Guild: you must join the Order of Ardougne monks first)

areas.name: Prison Door (alidoor)

areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate '%scorpcatcher < ^scorpcatcher_first_hint' on door scorpionwall; box(es) from region flood-fill (exact pocket extent)
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Old wall)

areas.name: Bamboo Door (tbwt_bamboo_door)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate '%tbwt_main < ^tbwt_complete' on door tbwt_bamboo_door; box(es) from region flood-fill incl. stacked floor(s) - verify upper-floor extents
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Bamboo Door)

areas.name: Secret Door (troll_stronghold_entrance)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate '%troll_opened_back_exit = ^false & %troll_quest < ^troll_freed_godric' on door troll_stronghold_entrance; box(es) from region flood-fill (exact pocket extent)
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Secret Door)

areas.name: Cave entrance (upass_caveentrance2)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate '%biohazard < ^biohazard_complete' on door upass_caveentrance2; box(es) from region flood-fill (exact pocket extent)
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Cave entrance)

areas.name: Door (viking_bard_backstage_door)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate '~get_viking_olaf_progress < ^olaf_complete & ~get_viking_olaf_progress > ^olaf_not_started & inv_total(inv, viking_enchanted_strung_lyre) > 0' on door viking_bard_backstage_door; box(es) from region flood-fill incl. stacked floor(s) - verify upper-floor extents
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Door)

areas.name: Door (viking_seers_door1)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate '%viking = ^viking_complete' on door viking_seers_door1; box(es) from region flood-fill incl. stacked floor(s) - verify upper-floor extents
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Door)

areas.name: Door (viking_seers_door2)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate 'inv_total(inv, viking_key) > 0 & ~check_axis(coord, loc_coord, loc_angle) = false' on door viking_seers_door2; box(es) from region flood-fill incl. stacked floor(s) - verify upper-floor extents
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Door)

areas.name: Ledge (waterfall_ledge_door)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate 'inv_total(worn, glarials_amulet_waterfall_quest) > 0 | inv_total(inv, glarials_amulet_waterfall_quest) > 0' on door waterfall_ledge_door; box(es) from region flood-fill incl. stacked floor(s) - verify upper-floor extents
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Ledge)

areas.name: Door (witchbackdoor)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate '%ballquest < ^ball_unlocked_mousedoor' on door witchbackdoor; box(es) from region flood-fill incl. stacked floor(s) - verify upper-floor extents
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Door)

areas.name: Door (witchhousedoor)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate 'inv_total(inv, witches_doorkey) > 0 | $leaving = true' on door witchhousedoor; box(es) from region flood-fill incl. stacked floor(s) - verify upper-floor extents
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Door)

areas.name: Mouse hole (witchmousehole)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate 'last_useitem = cheese' on door witchmousehole; box(es) from region flood-fill (exact pocket extent)
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Mouse hole)

areas.name: Door (witchsheddoor)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate '%ballquest >= ^ball_defeated_experiment' on door witchsheddoor; box(es) from region flood-fill (exact pocket extent)
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Door)

areas.name: Door (wydindoor)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate 'testbit(%hunt_store_employed, ^hunt_fetch_rum) = ^false' on door wydindoor; box(es) from region flood-fill incl. stacked floor(s) - verify upper-floor extents
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Door)

areas.name: Door (zanarisdoor)
areas.derivation: ScanDoors gate 'inv_total(worn, dramen_staff) > 0 & map_members = ^true' on door zanarisdoor; box(es) from region flood-fill (exact pocket extent)
areas.message: A strange force bars your way. (Door)
